Services
Tax-Efficient Strategies Minimize taxes with smart withdrawal sequencing. Portfolio Management Diversified portfolios aligned with your timeline. Retirement Money Map A clear plan for every dollar in retirement. 401(k) & IRA Rollovers Consolidate accounts and optimize your strategy. Social Security Optimization Time your benefits to maximize lifetime income. Estate & Legacy Planning Protect your family and pass wealth efficiently.

ABOUT US

Meet Capital Wealth Advisors

Since 2009, we've helped 1,000+ families retire with confidence — not confusion. Fiduciary advice. No commissions. No conflicts. Just honest guidance for the biggest financial transition of your life.

SCHEDULE A CONSULTATION →

FOUNDER & PRESIDENT

Michael Stevens, IAR

Investment Adviser Representative

25+ years fiduciary advisory Host, Retire Right Radio Author, Retire Right, Retire Now 1,000+ families served

Michael founded Capital Wealth Advisors in 2009 with a mission: help families retire with clarity, confidence, and a plan that actually works. Over 1,000 families and $500M+ in assets later, he's built a practice focused entirely on retirement income planning, tax optimization, and fiduciary advice.

He hosts Retire Right Radio (Utah's #1 retirement radio show), wrote Retire Right, Retire Now, and serves on the Junior Achievement of Utah board. No sales pitches. No product pushing. Just straight talk about retirement.

"I'm passionate about helping people bring all the pieces of their financial lives together with clarity and purpose."
MEET WITH MIKE → LINKEDIN ↗

THE TEAM

Your Retirement Planning Team

Mike Stevens

Founder & President

25+ years of fiduciary planning. Host of Retire Right Radio. Author. JA Utah board member.

LS

Lateesha Stevens

Co-Owner & Operations

Oversees client experience and operations. Ensures every family receives world-class service.

BT

Brent Thompson

Senior Advisor

Portfolio management and comprehensive planning. Works with clients on investment strategy and tax optimization.

KM

Kaden Moulton

Associate Advisor

Client support and planning analysis. Helps families navigate their retirement roadmap.

TW

Teresa Williams

Client Services

Administrative support and client coordination. Your first point of contact for service needs.

OUR PRINCIPLES

What We Stand For

Fiduciary. Always.

We're legally and ethically obligated to act in your best interest — no commissions, no hidden incentives, no conflicts. Just honest advice.

Retirement Specialists

We don't dabble in accumulation, college planning, or day trading. Retirement income planning is our entire focus — and we're really good at it.

Utah Roots

We live here, work here, and give back here. Community board seats, youth education, local radio — this is home.

Since 2009, Capital Wealth Advisors has guided 1,000+ families toward confident, tax-efficient retirement.

Families Served 1,000+
Years of Experience 25+
Fiduciary Commitment Always
